Quest

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Warp Gate in Vibrilian.
  2. Travel to Barbulos.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 2.

Quest Text

Description

Captain, we have found a new lifeform on Barbulos, its a sentient being and we think its trying to communicate with us. Land on Barbulos and figure out a way to understand what it wants.

Completion

Intelligent Sponge: “bzzarrpp bzaarr zbbzazbbr bzzazaaaaa bzzaaooprp”

Crew: “I think we need to visit someone who can translate this into our language. I heard Krux, a linguist, was last seen on Fexucius in Sarkinon where he tries to communicate with an unknown lifeform.”
